moments.title: World Cup Final Countdown
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 final is just one week away, scheduled for July 19th, 2026, marking the climax of the tournament co-hosted by the USA, Mexico, and Canada.

angles.name: Final Hype
angles.copy: Seven days. That's all that stands between us and the FIFA World Cup 2026 final! Who are you backing to lift the trophy?

angles.name: Looking Back, Looking Forward
angles.copy: It's been an incredible tournament so far, and the biggest game is almost here. What's been your highlight of the World Cup 2026?

angles.name: Sunday Showdown
angles.copy: Clear your diary! Next Sunday, July 19th, the world stops for the World Cup final. Where will you be watching?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival 2026 is set to take place from July 17-20 in Henham Park, Suffolk, bringing a packed lineup of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Festival Gates Open
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is almost here! Henham Park is gearing up for an incredible weekend. Who's heading to Suffolk?

angles.name: Weekend Vibes
angles.copy: From main stage headliners to hidden gems, Latitude always delivers. What acts are you most excited to catch this weekend?

angles.name: Beyond the Music
angles.copy: More than just music, Latitude brings comedy, theatre, and arts to Suffolk. What's your favourite non-music festival experience?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Natalie Maines
moments.blurb: Natalie Maines, lead vocalist of The Chicks, turns 52 today, July 12, 2026.

angles.name: Chicks Lead Singer
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to Natalie Maines of The Chicks, turning 52 today! What's your favourite Chicks anthem?

angles.name: Country Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 52nd Birthday to the powerhouse voice of The Chicks, Natalie Maines! From 'Wide Open Spaces' to 'Gaslighter', she's always delivered.

moments.title: Happy 80th Cheech Marin
moments.blurb: Richard 'Cheech' Marin, known for Cheech & Chong and his acting career, celebrates his 80th birthday tomorrow, July 13, 2026.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a comedy legend! Cheech Marin turns 80 tomorrow. What's your favourite Cheech & Chong moment?

angles.name: Happy 80th
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're wishing a very happy 80th birthday to the one and only Cheech Marin! What a career.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Louise Redknapp
moments.blurb: English singer and media personality Louise Redknapp, formerly of Eternal, turns 52 tomorrow, July 13, 2026.

angles.name: Eternal Star
angles.copy: Sending early birthday wishes to the fabulous Louise Redknapp, who turns 52 tomorrow! What's your favourite track from her Eternal days?

angles.name: 90s Pop Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow we celebrate the birthday of a true 90s pop icon, Louise Redknapp! Still 'Naked' on the dancefloor? 😉

moments.title: Happy 80th Linda Ronstadt
moments.blurb: Legendary American singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her diverse music genres, celebrates her 80th birthday on July 15, 2026.

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: In just a few days, we'll be wishing a huge Happy 80th Birthday to the incredible Linda Ronstadt! A voice that defined generations. What's your favourite song?

angles.name: First Lady of Rock
angles.copy: The 'First Lady of Rock', Linda Ronstadt, turns 80 this Wednesday! Her impact on music is immeasurable. Which of her hits is on your playlist?

moments.title: Happy 82nd Millie Jackson
moments.blurb: American R&B and soul recording artist Millie Jackson, famous for her outspoken vocal performances, turns 82 on July 15, 2026.

angles.name: Soul Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 82nd Birthday to the unique and iconic Millie Jackson this Wednesday! Her soulful voice and personality are legendary.

angles.name: R&B Queen
angles.copy: Millie Jackson, the 'Mother of Hip Hop' and an R&B queen, celebrates 82 years this week! What's your go-to Millie track?

moments.title: Happy 74th Stewart Copeland
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the acclaimed drummer for The Police, will celebrate his 74th birthday on July 16, 2026.

angles.name: Police Drummer
angles.copy: Get ready to hit play on some Police classics! Stewart Copeland turns 74 this Thursday. What's your favourite Police song?

angles.name: Rhythmic Genius
angles.copy: Happy 74th to the rhythmic genius, Stewart Copeland! His distinctive drumming shaped The Police's iconic sound.

moments.title: Happy 77th Geezer Butler
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, the bassist and primary lyricist for Black Sabbath, will turn 77 on July 17, 2026.

angles.name: Metal Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 77th Birthday to the legendary Geezer Butler this Friday! The man behind Black Sabbath's thunderous basslines and dark lyrics.

angles.name: Sabbath Bassist
angles.copy: From 'Paranoid' to 'Iron Man', Geezer Butler's bass defined heavy metal. Happy 77th to the Black Sabbath icon this Friday!

moments.title: Happy 51st M.I.A.
moments.blurb: British rapper, singer, and songwriter M.I.A. (Mathangi Arulpragasam) will celebrate her 51st birthday on July 18, 2026.

angles.name: Boundary Pusher
angles.copy: Get ready to move! M.I.A. turns 51 this Saturday. From 'Paper Planes' to 'Bad Girls', her sound is unforgettable.

angles.name: Global Artist
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible M.I.A. this Saturday! A true global artist who consistently pushes boundaries.

moments.title: Royal Welsh Show Approaches
moments.blurb: The Royal Welsh Show, a highlight of the agricultural calendar, is just around the corner, running from July 20th to 23rd, 2026, in Llanelwedd.

angles.name: Show Excitement
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is nearly here! Who's excited for four days of livestock, crafts, and Welsh culture in Llanelwedd? Starts July 20th!

angles.name: Countdown is On
angles.copy: Just over a week until the Royal Welsh Show kicks off! Get ready for a fantastic celebration of rural Wales.

moments.title: UK Summer Holiday Rush
moments.blurb: With schools breaking up and good weather expected, many across the UK are embarking on or planning their summer holidays this week.

angles.name: Travel Chaos or Bliss?
angles.copy: Summer holidays are officially here for many! Are you battling the traffic or already sipping a cold drink by the sea? Tell us your travel plans!

angles.name: Devon Getaways
angles.copy: From Dartmoor hikes to sandy beaches, Devon is the perfect summer escape. Where are you enjoying your local summer break?

angles.name: Welsh Staycation
angles.copy: Exploring the best of Wales this summer? Share your favourite Welsh hidden gems for a perfect staycation!

moments.title: Exeter Summer Culture
moments.blurb: Exeter is hosting various summer events this month, including 'Jazz on the Quay' every Sunday and the 'Exeter Craft Festival' from July 9-11.

angles.name: Jazz on the Quay
angles.copy: It's Sunday, which means 'Jazz on the Quay' is bringing the perfect soundtrack to Exeter's waterfront today! Soak up the vibes.

angles.name: Craft Festival
angles.copy: The Exeter Craft Festival wraps up today on Cathedral Green! Last chance to explore unique handmade goods and support local makers.
